channel.title: GitHub SCSS Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of SCSS in GitHub

item.title: Ileriayo/markdown-badges
item.description: Badges for your personal developer branding, profile, and projects.

item.title: RayeRen/acad-homepage.github.io
item.description: AcadHomepage: A Modern and Responsive Academic Personal Homepage

item.title: alex-shpak/hugo-book
item.description: Hugo documentation theme as simple as plain book

item.title: pages-themes/minimal
item.description: Minimal is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: emilbaehr/automatic-app-landing-page
item.description: A Jekyll theme for automatically generating and deploying landing page sites for mobile apps.

item.title: pages-themes/architect
item.description: Architect is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: thingsym/hugo-theme-techdoc
item.description: The Techdoc is a Hugo Theme for technical documentation.

item.title: zerostaticthemes/jekyll-serif-theme
item.description: Serif is a multi page business theme for Jekyll.

item.title: Fausto-Korpsvart/Gruvbox-GTK-Theme
item.description: A GTK theme based on the Gruvbox colour palette.

item.title: Keldos-Li/typora-latex-theme
item.description: 将Typora伪装成LaTeX的中文样式主题，本科生轻量级课程论文撰写的好帮手。This is a theme disguising Typora into Chinese LaTeX style.

item.title: maildev/maildev
item.description: 📫 SMTP Server + Web Interface for viewing and testing emails during development.

item.title: abhinavs/moonwalk
item.description: A fast & minimal Jekyll blog theme with clean dark mode

item.title: pages-themes/hacker
item.description: Hacker is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: overhangio/tutor-indigo
item.description: An elegant, customizable theme for Open edX

item.title: SlRvb/Obsidian--ITS-Theme
item.description: Theme designed with readability and customizability in mind. Change it easily to your liking with the Style Settings plugin installed.

item.title: just-the-docs/just-the-docs
item.description: A modern, high customizable, responsive Jekyll theme for documentation with built-in search.
